metadata.title: SYNGO_BP_4554
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Figure 1: TREK-1 KO depolarizes membrane potential and increases input resistance of hippocampal pyramidal neurons.
Figure 2: TREK-1 KO increases the excitability of CA1 pyramidal neurons.
Figure 3: TREK-1 null alters dendritic sprouting and the number of spines
Figure 4: TREK-1 KO increases excitatory and inhibitory synaptic transmission in CA1 pyramidal neurons.
Figure 5: TREK-1 KO increases Functional Expression of Postsynaptic AMPA Receptors.

Dnyanada 11/06/2021: The enhanced functional expression of postsynaptic AMPA receptors is inferred from AMPA-EPSC electrophysiological measurements. This paper does not further investigate this phenotype (eg via immunocytochemistry of surface AMPAR) and hence the general term "postsynaptic process..." was used.. Experimental description: TREK-1 gene (Kcnk2) knockout (TREK-1 KO) mice were generated on a mixed background of C57BL6J and SV129 strains. Prior to this study, this TREK-1 KO line has been backcrossed with C57BL6J for more than ten generations in our laboratory.
